summary: Results layer implements 3 modules: store (filesystem CRUD), index-manager (registry), exporter (Markdown/CSV)
context: Need to implement the results persistence and export layer per FR-RST-001, FR-RST-002, and FR-DSH-005.
rationale: Bottom-up dependency: store.ts provides toSortedJson() and filesystem ops, index-manager.ts imports from store for JSON serialization, exporter.ts is pure functions taking typed data and returning strings. Store uses deep-sorted JSON for git-trackable output. Markdown export follows the Section 9.3 template with box-drawing ranking table, auto-generated key findings, methodology section, and comparison tables. CSV export provides both per-iteration and aggregated formats for custom analysis.

alternatives.option: Use SQLite or LevelDB for results storage
alternatives.reason_rejected: PRD explicitly requires JSON files for git-trackability (FR-RST-001). File-based storage is simpler, needs no native deps, and results can be tracked alongside code.

alternatives.option: Use a templating engine (Handlebars/EJS) for Markdown export
alternatives.reason_rejected: The export is straightforward string concatenation. A template engine adds a dependency for minimal benefit. Pure functions are easier to test and maintain.
